---
title: "final_project_sol"
format: html
editor: visual
---

Display machine information:

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```

Display my machine memory.

```{r}
memuse::Sys.meminfo()
```

Load database libraries and the tidyverse frontend:

```{r}
library(bigrquery)
library(dbplyr)
library(DBI)
library(gt)
library(gtsummary)
library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)
library(data.table)
library(duckdb)
library(memuse)
library(pryr)
library(R.utils)
library(dplyr)
```

```{r}
# path to the service account token 
satoken <- "biostat-203b-2026-winter-92fefbfab477.json"
# BigQuery authentication using service account
bq_auth(path = satoken)
```

```{r}
# connect to the BigQuery database `biostat-203b-2025-mimiciv_3_1`
con_bq <- dbConnect(
    bigrquery::bigquery(),
    project = "biostat-203b-2025-winter",
    dataset = "mimiciv_3_1",
    billing = "biostat-203b-2025-winter"
)
con_bq
```

List all tables in the `mimiciv_3_1` database.

```{r}
dbListTables(con_bq)
```

## corhort

```{r}
proc_tbl <- tbl(con_bq, "procedureevents") |>
  select(subject_id, hadm_id, stay_id, itemid, value, starttime, endtime) |>
  print()
```
```{r}
patients_tbl <- tbl(con_bq, "patients") |>
  select(subject_id, gender, anchor_age) |>
  arrange(subject_id) 
```

```{r}
cohort_proc <- proc_tbl |>
  filter(itemid == 225792) |>
  inner_join(patients_tbl, by = "subject_id") |>
  filter(!is.na(starttime), !is.na(endtime)) |>
  filter(anchor_age >65) 
```


```{r}
cohort_tbl <- cohort_proc |>
   mutate(
    dur_sec = sql("DATETIME_DIFF(endtime, starttime, SECOND)"),
    dur_hr  = dur_sec / 3600.0
  ) |>
  filter(dur_hr >= 0) |>
  group_by(stay_id) |>
  summarise(
    subject_id = min(subject_id),
    hadm_id    = min(hadm_id),
    vent_start = min(starttime),
    vent_end   = max(endtime),
    vent_hr    = sum(dur_hr),
    n_vent_events = n(),
    y_prolong = sql(paste0("CAST(SUM(dur_hr) > ", 72, " AS INT64)")),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  print()
```

```{r}
cohort_tbl |>
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    n_stay = n_distinct(stay_id),
    n_subj = n_distinct(subject_id),
    prop_prolong = avg(y_prolong)
  ) |>
  collect()
```



## feature

### admissions

```{r}
admissions_tbl <- tbl(con_bq, "admissions") |>
  select(
    subject_id, 
    hadm_id, 
    admission_type, 
    admission_location, 
    race, 
    hospital_expire_flag
    ) |>
  arrange(subject_id, hadm_id) |>
  print(width=inf)
```

### icustays

```{r}
icustays_tbl   <- tbl(con_bq, "icustays") |>
  arrange(subject_id, stay_id) |>
  print(width=inf)
```

### omr


```{r}
omr_tbl <- tbl(con_bq, "omr") |>
  arrange(subject_id) |>
  print(width=inf)
```

```{r}
vent_anchor_subj <- proc_tbl |>
  filter(itemid == 225792) |>
  filter(!is.na(starttime)) |>
  group_by(subject_id) |>
  summarise(vent_start = min(starttime), .groups = "drop")

omr_bp_bmi <- omr_tbl |>
  filter(result_name %in% c("BMI (kg/m2)", "Blood Pressure"))

# Use COUNTIF instead of max(as.integer(bool))
omr_days_both <- omr_bp_bmi |>
  group_by(subject_id, chartdate) |>
  summarise(
    bmi_cnt = sql("COUNTIF(result_name = 'BMI (kg/m2)')"),
    bp_cnt  = sql("COUNTIF(result_name = 'Blood Pressure')"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  filter(bmi_cnt > 0, bp_cnt > 0)

best_day <- vent_anchor_subj |>
  inner_join(omr_days_both, by = "subject_id") |>
  mutate(
    rn = sql("
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY subject_id
        ORDER BY
          ABS(DATETIME_DIFF(DATETIME(chartdate), DATETIME(vent_start), SECOND)) ASC,
          chartdate DESC
      )
    ")
  ) |>
  filter(rn == 1) |>
  select(subject_id, omr_date = chartdate)

omr_bestday_long <- omr_bp_bmi |>
  inner_join(best_day, by = "subject_id") |>
  filter(chartdate == omr_date) |>
  mutate(
    rn2 = sql("
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY subject_id, result_name
        ORDER BY seq_num DESC
      )
    ")
  ) |>
  filter(rn2 == 1) |>
  select(subject_id, omr_date, result_name, result_value)

omr_features <- omr_bestday_long |>
  group_by(subject_id) |>
  summarise(
    omr_date = max(omr_date),
    bmi = sql("MAX(IF(result_name='BMI (kg/m2)', SAFE_CAST(result_value AS FLOAT64), NULL))"),
    bp_raw = sql("MAX(IF(result_name='Blood Pressure', result_value, NULL))"),
    sbp = sql("MAX(IF(result_name='Blood Pressure', SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(result_value,'/')[OFFSET(0)] AS FLOAT64), NULL))"),
    dbp = sql("MAX(IF(result_name='Blood Pressure', SAFE_CAST(SPLIT(result_value,'/')[OFFSET(1)] AS FLOAT64), NULL))"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  print()

# QC (optional)
omr_features |>
  summarise(n = n(), n_subj = n_distinct(subject_id)) |>
  collect()
```

### labevents

```{bash}
zcat < ~/mimic/hosp/d_labitems.csv.gz | grep -i Nitrogen
```

```{r}
lab_items <- c(
   51006, 50912, 50971, 50983
  )

labevents_tbl <- tbl(con_bq, "labevents") |>
  filter(itemid %in% lab_items) |>
  # 1) 只保留 cohort stays，並帶入 vent_start（DATETIME）
  inner_join(
    cohort_proc |>
      select(subject_id, hadm_id, stay_id, vent_start = starttime),
    by = c("subject_id", "hadm_id")
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(storetime), !is.na(valuenum)) |>
  # 2) 只取 vent_start 之前最後一筆（by storetime）
  filter(sql("DATETIME(storetime)") <= vent_start) |>
  group_by(stay_id, itemid) |>
  mutate(last_storetime = max(storetime)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  filter(storetime == last_storetime) |>
  # 3) ties 平均
  group_by(stay_id, itemid) |>
  summarise(valuenum = avg(valuenum), .groups = "drop") |>
  # 4) pivot wide
  group_by(stay_id) |>
  summarise(
    UreaNitrogen = sql("MAX(IF(itemid=51006, valuenum, NULL))"),
    creatinine   = sql("MAX(IF(itemid=50912, valuenum, NULL))"),
    potassium    = sql("MAX(IF(itemid=50971, valuenum, NULL))"),
    sodium       = sql("MAX(IF(itemid=50983, valuenum, NULL))"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  print()
```


### chartevents

```{r}
d_items_tbl <- tbl(con_bq, "d_items")
```

```{r}
chart_items <- c(
    220045,   # heart rate
    220179,   # systolic_bp
    220180,   # diastolic_bp
    223761,   # temperature_c
    220210    # respiratory_rate
  ) 

chartevents_tbl <- tbl(con_bq, "chartevents") |>
  # 1) restrict to cohort stays + bring in anchor time (starttime)
  inner_join(
    cohort_proc |>
      select(stay_id, starttime),  
    by = "stay_id"
  ) |>
  # 2) keep target vitals only
  filter(itemid %in% chart_items) |>
  filter(!is.na(storetime), !is.na(valuenum)) |>
  # 3) keep events at/after starttime
  #    storetime is usually TIMESTAMP; starttime may be DATETIME -> cast storetime to DATETIME
  filter(sql("DATETIME(storetime)") >= starttime) |>
  # 4) find first storetime per stay_id x itemid
  group_by(stay_id, itemid) |>
  mutate(first_storetime = min(storetime)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  filter(storetime == first_storetime) |>
  # 5) average ties at first storetime
  group_by(stay_id, itemid) |>
  summarise(
    valuenum = avg(valuenum),   # BigQuery AVG ignores NULL; don't use na.rm
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  # 6) pivot to wide columns (one row per stay_id)
  group_by(stay_id) |>
  summarise(
    heart_rate       = sql("MAX(IF(itemid=220045, valuenum, NULL))"),
    systolic_bp      = sql("MAX(IF(itemid=220179, valuenum, NULL))"),
    diastolic_bp     = sql("MAX(IF(itemid=220180, valuenum, NULL))"),
    temperature_c    = sql("MAX(IF(itemid=223761, valuenum, NULL))"),
    respiratory_rate = sql("MAX(IF(itemid=220210, valuenum, NULL))"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  print()
```

### services

```{r}
services_tbl <- tbl(con_bq, "services") |>
  select(subject_id, hadm_id, transfertime, curr_service) |>
  mutate(
    rn = sql("
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY subject_id, hadm_id
        ORDER BY transfertime DESC
      )
    ")
  ) |>
  filter(rn == 1) |>
  select(subject_id, hadm_id, curr_service)
```

## putting things together

```{r}
model_tbl <- cohort_tbl |>
  left_join(admissions_tbl, by = c("subject_id","hadm_id")) |>
  left_join(patients_tbl,   by = "subject_id") |>
  left_join(icustays_tbl |> select(stay_id, intime, outtime, first_careunit, last_careunit),
            by = "stay_id") |>
  left_join(omr_features,   by = "subject_id") |>
  left_join(services_tbl,     by = c("subject_id","hadm_id")) |>
  left_join(labevents_tbl,  by = "stay_id") |>
  left_join(chartevents_tbl,by = "stay_id") |>
  arrange(subject_id) |>
  print()
```

```{r}
check_keys <- function(x, name){
  x |>
    summarise(
      n = n(),
      n_subj = n_distinct(subject_id),
      n_hadm = n_distinct(hadm_id),
      n_stay = n_distinct(stay_id)
    ) |>
    collect() |>
    mutate(step = name)
}

check_keys(cohort_proc, "cohort_proc")      
check_keys(cohort_tbl, "cohort_tbl")
check_keys(model_tbl,   "after all joins")

```

```{r}
miss_tbl <- model_tbl |>
  summarise(
    n = n(),

    miss_urea = sql("AVG(IF(UreaNitrogen IS NULL, 1, 0))"),
    miss_cr   = sql("AVG(IF(creatinine IS NULL, 1, 0))"),
    miss_k    = sql("AVG(IF(potassium IS NULL, 1, 0))"),
    miss_na   = sql("AVG(IF(sodium IS NULL, 1, 0))"),

    miss_hr   = sql("AVG(IF(heart_rate IS NULL, 1, 0))"),
    miss_sbp  = sql("AVG(IF(systolic_bp IS NULL, 1, 0))"),
    miss_dbp  = sql("AVG(IF(diastolic_bp IS NULL, 1, 0))"),
    miss_temp = sql("AVG(IF(temperature_c IS NULL, 1, 0))"),
    miss_rr   = sql("AVG(IF(respiratory_rate IS NULL, 1, 0))")
  ) |>
  collect()
miss_tbl

```

```{r}
miss_rate <- sapply(model_local, function(x) mean(is.na(x)))
miss_rate <- sort(miss_rate, decreasing = TRUE)
miss_rate
```
## modeling

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(tidymodels)

# 0) outcome as factor
df <- model_tbl |>
  mutate(y_prolong = factor(y_prolong, levels = c(0, 1)))

# drop IDs if present
id_cols <- intersect(c("stay_id", "subject_id", "hadm_id"), names(df))
df <- df |> select(-all_of(id_cols))

# (optional but useful) convert "" -> NA for CHARACTER columns only
df <- df |>
  mutate(across(where(is.character), ~ na_if(.x, "")))

# 1) split
set.seed(203)
split_obj <- initial_split(df, prop = 0.8, strata = y_prolong)
train_df  <- training(split_obj)
test_df   <- testing(split_obj)

# 2) CV
set.seed(203)
folds <- vfold_cv(train_df, v = 5, strata = y_prolong)

# 3) recipe (no step_mutate_at!)
rec <- recipe(y_prolong ~ ., data = train_df) |>
  step_zv(all_predictors()) |>
  # turn character -> factor where needed (safe)
  step_string2factor(all_nominal_predictors()) |>
  # NA levels -> "unknown"
  step_unknown(all_nominal_predictors(), new_level = "Unknown") |>
  # numeric median impute
  step_impute_median(all_numeric_predictors()) |>
  # one-hot
  step_dummy(all_nominal_predictors(), one_hot = TRUE)

# 4) model + workflow
log_spec <- logistic_reg() |>
  set_engine("glm")

wf <- workflow() |>
  add_recipe(rec) |>
  add_model(log_spec)

cls_metrics <- metric_set(roc_auc, pr_auc)

# 5) CV
cv_res <- fit_resamples(
  wf,
  resamples = folds,
  metrics = cls_metrics,
  control = control_resamples(save_pred = TRUE)
)
collect_metrics(cv_res)

# 6) test eval
final_res <- last_fit(wf, split_obj, metrics = cls_metrics)
collect_metrics(final_res)

# 7) Brier score on test
pred_test <- collect_predictions(final_res) |>
  mutate(y01 = as.integer(y_prolong == "1"),
         brier = (.pred_1 - y01)^2)

mean(pred_test$brier)
```
